name: FCG 14/11/2025 4.15% Fonterra C
summary: FCG 14/11/2025 4.15% Fonterra C is a bond issued by Fonterra Co-operative Group Limited. It is a debt instrument with a specific maturity date of 14/11/2025 and an interest rate of 4.15%. Fonterra is a multinational dairy cooperative based in New Zealand.
